description: One normalized top-level Markdown block parsed by markdown-rs. Normalization: input bytes are decoded to text and rendered as UTF-8, CRLF and CR line endings become LF, leading and trailing line endings around each parsed top-level block are removed, inter-block blank lines are collapsed to one empty line, and documents render with a single trailing LF.

id.description: Stable block entity pk. New blocks are generated as UUIDv7 strings. Must match the block entity_pk.

order_key.description: Opaque variable-length byte order key encoded as lowercase hex. Lexicographic string order matches Markdown block order.

block.description: Normalized Markdown source for a single top-level markdown-rs block.
